name: ALXQuant_v7
observations: MQL5 EA + Python data pipeline for algorithmic trading
Located at C:\ALXQuant_v7
Two independent git repos: outer (Python/docs/config) and inner/MQL5 (EA/framework)

MQL5 MCP servers available: ariadng/metatrader-mcp-server (Python, 577 stars) and mcp-metatrader5-server (Python, Qoyyuum) — both bridge AI to MetaTrader 5 via MCP protocol. Require MT5 terminal running with algo trading enabled. User showed interest but didn't install yet.

name: EAQuant_v7.mq5
observations: Current version: v7.5.1
#property version \"7.51\"
EA_VERSION = \"v7.5.1\"
51 inputs in 15 groups with NN.MM numbering
OnInit calls framework.risk.InitProfiles() and framework.news.Init()
OnTick checks IsDirectionBlocked() before ApplySLTP

name: EventRiskNLP.py
observations: Located at data/DataHouse/coletores/EventRiskNLP.py
Version v1.0.0
Crisis detection pipeline with 3 severity tiers (Tier1 STOP 24h, Tier2 12h, Tier3 4h)
Uses CrisisDetector with keywords + FinBERT classification
Has false positive mismatch penalty when FinBERT disagrees with keywords
Outputs EventRisk.csv, EventRiskEvents.json, EventRiskHistory.csv

name: EventRisk.mqh
observations: Located at ALXFramework/EventRisk.mqh
Reads EventRisk.csv via kernel32 + FwReadCSV
60s cache to avoid re-reading every tick
Functions: IsBlocked, GetScore, GetSignal, GetHeadline

name: RiskSentiment.mqh
observations: Located at ALXFramework/core/RiskSentiment.mqh
Directional bias module (v7.5.0)
SAssetRiskProfile struct with safe_haven/risk_on types
IsDirectionBlocked blocks specific trade direction without triggering global Snapshot block

name: MCP_Servers
observations: Memory MCP (@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory)
FRED MCP (fred-mcp-server v1.0.2) with API key from .env
Sequential Thinking (@modelcontextprotocol/server-sequential-thinking)
PostgreSQL MCP (read-only user mcp_readonly on alxquant DB)

name: KeyDecisions
observations: TimeFilter closed penalty = 0.8 (not 0.3) to avoid killing fit scores
XAUUSD removed from default Inp_FxMap because gold trades 24h
IsDirectionBlocked does NOT set m_blocked to avoid global Snapshot block
EventRisk false positive mismatch penalty reduces severity on FinBERT disagreement
All input descriptions in English with strategy context
Input numbering NN.MM for navigation in MT5 Properties
